instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that renders a one-level nested list from `categories`, where each category map has `name` and optional `items` (sequence of strings). Escape all text. Categories without items still render their heading.
code:
<#-- Model: categories: sequence of maps { name, items? } -->
    <#list categories![] as category>
  • ${category.name?html} <#if category.items?has_content>
      <#list category.items as item>
    • ${item?html}
